screenshot_method: code+dom-audit (chrome MCP tools not loaded in this session; no headless browser available locally)

checks.name: Hero 3-crumb breadcrumb
checks.evidence: page.tsx breadcrumb prop is a BreadcrumbItem[] with 3 entries: Home, Yoga courses, Online 300 Hour Yoga Teacher Training (current). DOM has <nav aria-label="breadcrumb"> with all three labels rendered; href="/yoga-courses" present for second crumb.

checks.name: Availability strip between subtitle and CTA
checks.evidence:
CourseHeroSection renders the strip when `availability` prop is supplied. DOM contains 'Available in 4 Centers', divider '·', and Check availability →. Order in JSX: subtitle

→ availability → CTA .

checks.name: Testimonials section between Certification and Pre-Requisites
checks.evidence: DOM id sequence: id="certification" → id="testimonials" → id="pre-requisites". Matches Figma vertical ordering.

checks.name: Mosaic layout (1 lg + 4 sm) at lg+ breakpoint
checks.evidence: TestimonialsSection layout='mosaic' renders grid with classes `grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-rows-2`; the size:'lg' card carries `lg:row-span-2`. HTML grep confirms one occurrence of each class. Mobile/md fall back to single/2-col stack.

checks.name: All previously-rendered sections still present (no regressions)
checks.evidence: All section ids (overview, highlights, curriculum, eligibility, certification, testimonials, pre-requisites, instructors, faq, more-courses) appear once each in rendered HTML in expected order. Page weight ~197KB suggests full render.

checks.name: Sticky CourseSectionNav with IntersectionObserver scrollspy
checks.evidence: course-section-nav.tsx uses sticky positioning (top-[88px]/sm:top-[72px]) and IntersectionObserver with rootMargin '-160px 0px -55% 0px' to drive the activeHref state. Active link gets the brand pill style; inactive use text-text-secondary.

checks.name: Console errors
checks.evidence: Chrome MCP tools (mcp__claude-in-chrome__*) are not loaded in this session and no local headless browser (chromium, puppeteer, playwright) is installed. Server returned HTTP 200; HTML is well-formed. Recommend a manual browser pass to verify zero console errors.

checks.name: Token discipline — no hex / clamp() in extended code
checks.evidence: Diff this round: course-hero-section.tsx availability strip uses text-mini, text-text-tertiary, text-text-brand — clean. testimonials-section.tsx mosaic branch uses Tailwind grid utilities — clean. NOTE: testimonials-section.tsx still carries a pre-existing `bg-[#FCFCFC]` at line 106 — NOT introduced this round (was already in default-grid path); flagging as inherited debt only.

checks.name: Action wiring — Check availability link
checks.evidence: next/link with href="/centers" rendered. Click would route. Matches build-plan T2 interaction spec ('navigate', href_from_prop: availability.linkHref).

checks.name: Motion declarations match spec
checks.evidence: course-hero-section.tsx: framer-motion imported; availability strip wrapped in motion.div with fade-in-up at delay 0.45 (matches spec). Reduced-motion branch resolves to instant. testimonials-section.tsx: motion variants for header (fade-in-up), row (stagger 0.1s, slightly less than the 0.12 'slow' primitive — within plan tolerance), cards (fade-in-up). Hover-lift handled inside TestimonialCard (whileHover y:-4).

findings.expected: Per Figma 805:10091, the tall (lg) testimonial card uses a dark brand-green background with light/inverted text and a quote glyph (visually distinct featured slot).
findings.got: Tall card renders with the same neutral bg-card surface as the four small cards — only its grid footprint differs (row-span-2).
findings.fix_suggestion: Out of scope per build plan (do NOT modify TestimonialCard). To match Figma exactly, add an additive `variant: 'featured' | 'default'` prop on TestimonialCard in a follow-up. Current state is the agreed minimum-diff outcome.
Replace with `bg-surface-1` in a follow-up cleanup. Pre-existing — NOT introduced this round.
Plan flagged this as 'NOT required'. Leave as-is unless design pushes back.

findings.expected: Either a real token (e.g. shadow-sm) or removal.
findings.got: Class `shadow-` is invalid Tailwind and renders nothing.
findings.fix_suggestion: Remove the orphan token or replace with `shadow-sm`. Pre-existing — NOT introduced this round.

notes: Visual diffing was performed by inspecting the Figma reference image alongside the rendered DOM and component source. A full pixel-diff requires a headless browser screenshot which is unavailable in this session.
The page achieves all four functional acceptance criteria from build-plan T3 (compiles, hero strip present, testimonials inserted at correct position, mosaic layout active at lg+).
All findings are inherited from explicit out-of-scope decisions in the build plan or pre-existing tech debt — no regressions caused by this round's changes.
